title: cynodendron bicolor
intro: Cynodendron bicolor, also known as the native red hawthorn, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its antispasmodic and astringent properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, lowering cholesterol levels, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant's medicinal properties can be found in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
